name: tomtom-traffic-analytics-mcp
description: MCP server for TomTom traffic analytics — junctions, routes, incidents, and area analysis.
long_description: Enables AI assistants to access real-time and historical traffic data from TomTom APIs for area analysis, junction monitoring, route tracking, and live traffic insights. Uses in-memory SQL filtering of API responses.

tools.name: tomtom-area-analytics-stats
tools.description: Retrieve area analytics statistics for GeoJSON polygon regions

tools.name: tomtom-junction-search
tools.description: Search and filter all junctions using SQL queries

tools.name: tomtom-route-search
tools.description: Search and filter all routes using SQL queries

tools.name: tomtom-traffic-flow-segment
tools.description: Real-time traffic for road segments at coordinates

tools.name: tomtom-traffic-incidents
tools.description: Traffic incidents in an area with multi-area comparison

tomtom_move_portal_key.title: TomTom MOVE Portal Key
tomtom_move_portal_key.description: API key for TomTom MOVE Portal. Required for junction, route, and area analytics tools. Get yours at https://move.tomtom.com/register

tomtom_api_key.title: TomTom Developer API Key
tomtom_api_key.description: API key for TomTom Developer Portal. Required for live traffic tools (flow, incidents). Get yours at https://developer.tomtom.com/
